name: Hacker's Unity
target_audience: Developers, students, tech enthusiasts, and aspiring hackers
description: Hacker's Unity is a platform that hosts hackathons and sells online courses in blockchain, AI, and cybersecurity. It serves the tech community by bridging education with hands-on competitive experiences.
key_differentiators: Courses paired with practical hackathon experience
Focus on emerging tech: blockchain, AI, cybersecurity
